verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Savior lead me, lest I stray, Gently lead me all the way; I am safe when by Thy side, I would in Thy love abide.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lead me, lead me, Savior, lead me, lest I stray; Gently down the stream of time, Lead me Savior, all the way.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thou the refuge of my soul, When life's stormy billows roll, I am safe when Thou art nigh, All my hopes on Thee rely.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Savior, lead me, then at last, When the storm of life is past, To the land of endless day, Where all tears are wiped away.
